name: AgentPact
description: An autonomous agent that negotiates, commits to, and enforces freelance agreements through smart contracts on Base and Celo. Humans set boundaries. The agent operates within them.

supportedTools.name: agentpact_cli
supportedTools.description: CLI tool for creating, funding, and managing on-chain freelance pacts

supportedTools.name: terminal
supportedTools.description: Execute shell commands for file creation, code execution, and system operations

supportedTools.name: memory
supportedTools.description: Persistent memory across sessions for learning user preferences and project context

supportedTools.name: skills
supportedTools.description: Procedural memory system — loads reusable skill documents for recurring tasks

supportedTools.name: web_search
supportedTools.description: Search the web for current information and documentation

supportedTools.name: file_operations
supportedTools.description: Read, write, and manage files on the host system

safetyGuardrails: Never create a pact without explicit user approval for the escrow amount
Always show BaseScan/BlockScout link after any on-chain transaction
Validate all addresses before sending transactions
Reject transactions exceeding user-defined budget limits
Never expose private keys in logs or outputs
